Beta Corp — Deployment Guide

Account TypeMid-Market
Overall HealthAt Risk
RegionAzure West US
Active Users12
Last Updated2026-04-16

Overview

Beta Corp deployed Maze in February 2026. Adoption has been slower than expected — primary contact changed in March.

Architecture

  • Cloud Provider: Azure West US
  • Auth Method: Azure AD (OIDC)
  • Deployment Type: SaaS multi-tenant

Health Status

MetricValueNotes
Uptime99.9%Above SLA
Active Users12Below target of 30
Open Tickets0
Scan Coverage41%Needs attention

Open Items

  1. Schedule re-onboarding call with new champion (Marcus T.)
  2. Review scan coverage gaps — Azure subscriptions not yet connected
  3. Confirm renewal timeline (contract expires July 2026)

Notes

Previous champion left the company. New contact Marcus T. is responsive but needs re-education on the platform.
